Why we exist

To positively impact underserved communities, breaking the cycle from one generation to the next.

We provide families and students with meaningful resources: college scholarships, food security, and free youth basketball camps that build skill, character, and belief.

“If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.”  John 13:17

What we do

Three ways we show up.

Every program is built to remove a barrier and open a door.

01 / Education

Scholarships

We back Houston students with the determination to go further, helping college dreams become reality.

Invest in a student →
02 / Community

Community Aid

Partnering with the Houston Food Bank and local grocers so no family wonders where the next meal comes from.

See the work →
03 / Youth

DawgWork Camps

Free basketball camps where kids build skills, gain life experience, and learn from people who made it.

Register now →

Our story

“It started as a saying I told myself to stay encouraged: it's only right. You're blessed when you serve others and do right by them. That became the whole mission.”

Shannon ShorterFounder · Professional basketball player
